title: Orbital Type
description: Represents a semantic type registered in the Orbital workspace, used by TaxiQL to discover and orchestrate data fetching across connected services.

qualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the type.

fields.description: Fields defined on this type (for MODEL types).

type.description: Qualified type name of the field.

sources.description: Data sources that expose this type.

schemaId.description: ID of the schema that defines this type.
